name: agent_memory_read
description: Read and retrieve data from the agent's memory. Use this to access previously stored information, workflow state, learned patterns, or any data saved during previous executions. You can read specific contexts (workflow, session, persistent) or search across all memory.

agent_id.description: Agent ID to read memory from. If not provided, will use the current execution context's agent ID.

context.description: Memory context to read from - workflow for current task state, session for temporary data, persistent for long-term learned patterns, or all for everything

path.description: Specific JSON path to retrieve (e.g., 'contexts.workflow.current_step' or 'contexts.persistent.learned_patterns')

search_query.description: Search for memory entries containing this text or pattern

limit.description: Maximum number of memory entries to return when searching
